flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southwestern Community College rose 67% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.9k → $13.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southwestern Community College rose 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.6k → $4.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southwestern Community College fell 32% between 2006 and 2009 (20.1% → 13.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southwestern Community College fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6k → 1.2k).
